typography.instruction: Avoid Inter/Roboto for headings. Use Manrope for sharp, modern authoritative headers. Maintain tight tracking on large text.

spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Use strict bento grid for marketing/hero sections (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-12). Use classic multi-column grid (grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4) for product listings.
spacing_and_layout.spacing_scale: Generous spacing. Use p-6, p-8, p-12 for sections. Items inside cards should have p-4 or p-6.
spacing_and_layout.borders_and_radius: Subtle border-radius (rounded-md to rounded-lg max). Hard 1px borders (border-gray-200) for structural clarity.
spacing_and_layout.shadows: Ambient diffuse shadows for cards (shadow-sm). On hover, transition to shadow-md and translate-y-[-2px].

components.navigation: Sticky white header (z-50) with subtle bottom border. Include Logo, robust Search bar in center, Account, Wishlist, and Cart icons. Must not hide desktop links behind a hamburger menu.
components.hero_section: Bento-style layout instead of a generic carousel. 1 massive feature block (spanning multiple rows/columns) with the premium tech background, and 2 smaller side promo blocks.
components.product_card: Surface white, 1px gray border. Image takes top 60%. Bottom 40% holds title (truncate 2 lines), price, rating, and Add to Cart button. Hover: Image slight zoom, card lift.
components.buttons: Primary buttons: bg-[#0052FF] text-white hover:bg-[#0040CC] rounded-md font-semibold transition-all. Secondary: border border-gray-300 bg-white hover:bg-gray-50 text-gray-700.
components.product_page: One Long Page layout. Left column: Sticky Image Gallery (large main image, thumbnails below). Right column: Product info, title, price, variants, persistent 'Add to Cart' button, accordion for details/reviews.
components.forms_inputs: Shadcn UI inputs. 1px solid border, focus ring with primary color. Labels must be visible.
components.admin_dashboard: High-density layout. Strict grid hierarchy. Minimal animations. Cardless or 1px bordered widgets for data clarity.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: All interactive elements must change state (opacity, background color, or transform).
motion_and_interactions.transitions: Use transition-all duration-200 ease-in-out for buttons and cards.
motion_and_interactions.loading: Skeleton loaders for product grids. Minimalist spinners for buttons.

media_and_assets.icons: Use @phosphor-icons/react for modern, slightly duotone or regular weight icons that look premium.

hero_background.description: Premium e-commerce geometric pedestal background for hero section

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text over images has dark overlays. Follow APCA contrast rules.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='add-to-cart-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the Light Theme and Swiss & High-Contrast archetype.
Implement navigation without hiding desktop links behind a hamburger menu.
Use Manrope for headings and IBM Plex Sans for body text.
Do not use transparent headers over hero images; ensure the nav has a white or frosted glass background.
For the hero layout, implement a bento grid structure using the provided 'hero_background' image.
Map the product images provided in 'media_and_assets' into the product catalog and detail pages.
Ensure all buttons and inputs use the color hexes defined under 'color_palette'.
Use the exact image URLs provided; do not use placeholders like via.placeholder.com.
Add 'data-testid' to all critical UI components for testing.
